About us

We are
competitive in
architecture solutions

REMAS is one of the most successful and growing companies in the engineering consultancy sector in the the region, and we have the ability to manage more than 90 projects at the same time through the highly qualified engineers with high experiance in this sector.

As a leader in the field of building permits in Abu Dhabi, we are keen to bring to our customers the best and most innovative architectural designs, economic and competition in this field.

Read More

Our Mission

We have been commissioned to undertake a wide range of projects, ranging from small villas to large scale residential complexes and a variety of services. We are result oriented company that provides excellent and superior quality drawings. Bearing in mind the vision and objectives of our Company, we deal with everyone and accomplish our business objectives in an open and ethical manner.

Read More

Our Values

Safeguard - We operate ethically and with integrity, while prioritizing safety and security in all that we do.

Collaborate - We build diverse teams that connect expertise to create innovative solutions.

Inspire - We develop and celebrate our people, and elevate the communities we touch.

Read More

Our Services

Architecture

Architecture is more than symbolic. Artfulness is derived from purpose and creative problem solving, from challenging what’s expected to discover opportunities to do things in better & more creative ways.

Read More

Structures

Being one of the best organizations, we are offering Structure Interior Designing Service. This service is executed by our skilled interior designers in close coordination with our prestigious clients.

Read More

Supervision

Architectural supervision, a core service we provide throughout the entire period of the construction phase through to the conclusion of the project, is one of the most important services we render.

Read More
